en: It has the capability of solving over 24,000 multiplications per second.
ko: 초당 24,000회 이상의 곱셈을 해결할 수 있습니다.

en: Holy Moses, that's lightning fast. They'll never get that to work.
It'll run eventually. And when it does, we have to know how to program it.
Unless you'd rather be out of a job.
Mr. Z, I got a court date.
The computer uses it as its high-speed storage unit and information holding device.
ko: 컴퓨터는 이를 고속 저장 장치 및 정보 보관 장치로 사용합니다.

en: Hmm. So you have a brain.
ko: 당신은 똑똑하군요. 그걸로 작업할 수 있어요.
